patterns.copy: We're having trouble loading the menu. Please try again.
patterns.interaction_rules: Persistent until user clicks Retry. Button shows loading spinner and disables during the retry attempt to prevent spamming.
patterns.accessibility: Container must have role="alert" and aria-live="assertive". Focus should smoothly move to the retry button upon error appearance.

patterns.components: AlertDialog, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel (shadcn/ui)
patterns.copy: Connection timed out. We couldn't confirm your order. Please check with your server or try placing it again.
patterns.interaction_rules: Requires explicit user dismissal. Prevent outside click to close. If retrying, disable the action button to prevent double submissions. Provide both a Dismiss and Retry option.
patterns.accessibility: AlertDialog handles focus trapping natively. Ensure the description uses aria-describedby linked to the dialog title.

patterns.copy: Some restaurant details are taking a moment to update.
patterns.interaction_rules: Auto-dismiss after 5 seconds. Does not block the screen or user interaction. Stack seamlessly with existing toasts.
patterns.accessibility: Toast container should use role="status" or aria-live="polite" so it doesn't aggressively interrupt screen readers.

general_constraints: No new fonts, colors, or design tokens.
No new animation libraries; utilize existing framer-motion if necessary but keep simple.
Mobile-first layouts: Ensure AlertDialog buttons are easily tappable (min 44px height) and Toasts do not obscure primary mobile navigation or floating action buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent: Use these exact patterns for implementing the UI portion of CR-2026-07-03-004. Apply them specifically to the LandingPage, CartDrawer/ReviewOrder, and general layout contexts. Inject the data-testids as provided.
